input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.3.3
            TITLE: the driver must be able to operate the quick disconnect while in the normal driving position

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.3.3: The driver must be able to operate the quick disconnect while in the normal driving position
V.3.3.3 The driver must be able to operate the quick disconnect while in the normal driving position 
with gloves on.

final_answer: The driver must be able to operate the quick disconnect while in the normal driving position with gloves on.
